summary: User corrected a workflow boundary before it became a repeated behavior.

source_refs.summary: Thread where the correction and desired boundary were discussed.

case.situation: An agent is deciding whether a chat correction should become durable behavior.
case.observed: The correction was only discussed in the thread and had no structured intake artifact.
case.desired: Capture a compact event that can later be routed into a promote request.
case.evidence: The HS workflow needs event intake before router and proposal generation can run.

routing_hints.reason: The behavior should become a checkable regression before any owner apply flow.
